jline.api.PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn

Package
Description
jline.api
This package contains most algorithms for solving stochastic models

  • Uses of PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn in jline.api

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_linearizerms(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix nservers)
    Multiserver version of Krzesinski's Linearizer
    static PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_linearizerms(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix nservers, Matrix type)
    Multiserver version of Krzesinski's Linearizer
    static PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_linearizerms(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix nservers, Matrix type, double tol)
    Multiserver version of Krzesinski's Linearizer
    static PFQN.pfqnLinearizerMSReturn
    PFQN.pfqn_linearizerms(Matrix L, Matrix N, Matrix Z, Matrix nservers, Matrix type, double tol, int maxiter)
    Multiserver version of Krzesinski's Linearizer as described in Conway 1989, Fast Approximate Solution of Queueing Networks with Multi-Server Chain- Dependent FCFS Queues.
